Become What They Fear

A GameBoy-style adventure game about possession, fear mechanics, and strategic scaring.

Itch.io GitHub repo
Game JamRetroGameBoy Style2D
## Overview **Become What They Fear** is a retro-inspired GameBoy-style adventure game centered around the afterlife and psychological fear mechanics. You play as a ghost who can possess people, discover their fears, and strategically scare them to progress through each level. The core gameplay revolves around observation, possession, and manipulating environments to fill a **spooky meter** before confronting your main target. ## Core Mechanics - Possession / unpossession system - Fear-based progression mechanics - Spooky meter system tied to gameplay events - Target-based level objectives - Environmental and NPC interaction ## Gameplay Rules - While possessed, characters cannot be scared. - Each level contains a specific target. - The target can only be scared after filling the spooky meter. - The spooky meter increases by scaring other characters. ## Controls ### Menu - Navigate: Arrow Keys - Select: K - Back: M ### In-Game - Move: WASD - Possess / Unpossess: K - Scare / Interact: M - Return to Level Selector: Backspace ## Design Highlights - Strategy-driven scare system - Player-driven experimentation - Retro GameBoy-inspired aesthetic - Puzzle-like progression through NPC behavior ## Team Developed by the Romanian team: - Rosu Vlad-Andrei - **Simion Petrică** - Bratasanu Anda-Iulia
